tagline: An agentic equity research copilot for Taiwan-listed companies
subtagline: Data → Analyst → Risk → Reporter — every conclusion ships with traceable citations.
feature_multi_agent_desc: A Supervisor orchestrates Data / Analyst / Risk / Reporter with a Risk self-critique loop.
feature_rag_desc: BM25 + dense embedding + cross-encoder rerank over MOPS filings, transcripts, and notes.
feature_audit_desc: Every tool call and every revision is logged to Langfuse and streamed to the trace UI.
footer_disclaimer: Output is for research purposes only and is not investment advice.
